name: Brain Train Puzzle Game
description: Brain Train ek fun aur addictive puzzle game hai jo aapke dimaag ko sharp aur focus ko strong banata hai. Is game mein aapko different types ke logic puzzles, memory challenges aur brain teasers milte hain jo har age ke players ke liye perfect hain. Game ka simple aur clean design aapko stress-free experience deta hai, jabke increasing difficulty levels aapko har stage par naya challenge dete hain. Chahe aap free time mein khel rahe ho ya daily brain exercise ke liye – Brain Train best choice hai.
instructions: - To click any button use mouse
